data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Context
Story: 4c60-5e2e — As a DSO plugin developer, I can check if a ticket exists via the CLI in sub-millisecond time.

Implement ticket exists <id>: O(1) directory + CREATE-file presence check, no reducer invocation.

## What to Build

### 1. plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-exists.sh (CREATE)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Usage: ticket exists <ticket_id>
# Exits 0 if ticket exists (directory present with CREATE event file), non-zero otherwise.
# Archived tickets return 0 (directory still present).
# Sub-10ms O(1) check — does NOT invoke ticket-reducer.py.
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
TRACKER_DIR="${TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR:-${REPO_ROOT}/.tickets-tracker}"
ticket_id="${1:-}"
if [ -z "$ticket_id" ]; then
    echo "Usage: ticket exists <ticket_id>" >&2
    exit 1
fi
ticket_dir="${TRACKER_DIR}/${ticket_id}"
if [ -d "$ticket_dir" ] && ls "$ticket_dir/"*-CREATE.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    exit 0
fi
exit 1
```

### 2. plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh (MODIFY — append)
```bash
# ── ticket_exists ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ticket_exists() {
    bash "$_TICKETLIB_DIR/ticket-exists.sh" "$@"
    return $?
}
```

### 3. plugins/dso/scripts/ticket (MODIFY — add case)
Add exists case before the wildcard case. Follow REVIEW-DEFENSE comment pattern:
```bash
exists)
    # REVIEW-DEFENSE: _ensure_initialized is omitted when TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR is set.
    # ticket-exists.sh checks filesystem directly (not via TICKET_CMD). In test
    # environments TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR provides the fixture directory; _ensure_initialized
    # would attempt to call ticket-init.sh against a non-existent real tracker.
    if [ -z "${TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR:-}" ]; then
        _ensure_initialized
    fi
    # shellcheck source=/dev/null
    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-lib-api.sh"
    _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_exists "$@"
    exit $?
    ;;
```

Also add to _usage() and top-level comments:
- In _usage(): `echo "  exists        Check if a ticket exists (exit 0=exists, non-zero=not found)"`
- In top-level comment: `#   ticket exists <id>                              — exit 0 if ticket exists`

### 4. .test-index (MODIFY)
Remove RED marker [test_exists_routes_through_dispatcher] from the test-ticket-exists-dispatcher.sh entry after tests pass.

## Files to Modify
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-exists.sh | CREATE |
| plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh | MODIFY (append ticket_exists wrapper) |
| plugins/dso/scripts/ticket | MODIFY (add exists case, _usage entry, top comment) |
| .test-index | MODIFY (remove RED marker after GREEN) |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket-exists.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-exists.sh
- [ ] ticket_exists() wrapper present in ticket-lib-api.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket_exists()' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] exists case present in dispatcher
  Verify: grep -q 'exists)' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket
- [ ] TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR injection: exists returns 0 for dir with CREATE file
  Verify: D=$(mktemp -d); mkdir "$D/t1"; echo '{}' > "$D/t1/ts-CREATE.json"; TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR="$D" bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-exists.sh t1; echo $?; rm -rf "$D"
- [ ] exists returns non-zero for missing ticket
  Verify: D=$(mktemp -d); TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR="$D" bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-exists.sh nosuchticket; test $? -ne 0; rm -rf "$D"
- [ ] Full test suite passes (RED marker removed, tests GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-exists-dispatcher.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (no Python files changed but gate runs)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep '\[test_exists_routes_through_dispatcher\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
data.title: [GREEN] Implement ticket exists subcommand
